benefits.description: Felt another slight increase in body composition and strength after starting CJC-IPA
Planning to use HGH for recovery support during long-term resistance training

side_effects.description: Concerned about weird head and gut thing at higher doses

protocol_notes: On TRT (100mg testosterone per week). Taking CJC-IPA for ~4 months. Planning to start HGH at 2 IU daily, titrating up to 4 IU if tolerated. Currently has bloodwork done while on CJC-IPA. Plans frequent blood testing during HGH titration. Also on 100mg/week testosterone TRT. Concerned about cancer risk and side effects from higher HGH doses.
